Everything you want, nothing you'll owe.

About this catalog: every item, brand name, and price below comes from a real Indian quick-commerce grocery dataset (Kaggle) — 26,090 products across 11 categories. Product images are real, free-license photos from Pixabay — one representative photo per category (e.g. a milk carton for dairy, a shampoo bottle for beauty), not exact product photography, since matching real photos to 26K+ individual branded items isn't something this build can do reliably or safely.
Never Arrives is a fake shopping site — a "dopamine site." Everything here is make-believe: the checkout, the UPI ID, the card on file. No real payment is ever processed, no OTP is sent, no card or UPI details are collected, and nothing is shipped. It's built for people who want the rush of ordering without the spending, the clutter, or the regret. If you catch yourself wanting to buy something real afterward — that pull is worth noticing before you act on it.
